2605.18163.title: TRACE: Trajectory Correction from Cross-layer Evidence for Hallucination Reduction
2605.18163.paper_summary: Hallucination correction is not a one-direction problem. We show that intermediate layers are neither uniformly more truthful than final layers nor uniformly less trustworthy. Yet hallucination reduction is usually instantiated through one fixed intervention form: contrast one layer against another, steer along a truthfulness direction, or defer to external evidence. This framing is structurally incomplete. Cross-layer factual evidence does not evolve uniformly: in some failures truthful support is present internally and later suppressed, whereas in others candidate competition remains genuinely multi-directional across depth, so no single signed scalar family is generally sufficient. We introduce Trajectory Correction from Cross-layer Evidence for Hallucination Reduction (TRACE), a deterministic, training-free algorithm which corrects hallucinations at inference time by deriving both the corrective layer and the appropriate correction operator from each input's cross-layer candidate trajectory inside the LLM's own forward pass. Under one frozen hyperparameter setting, TRACE selects among scalar reversal, earlier-state recovery, and candidate-space correction using only model-internal evidence. Evaluated as a single universal algorithm across 15 models, 8 model families, and 3 factuality benchmarks, TRACE improves every evaluation cell, yielding mean gains of +12.26 MC1 points and +8.65 MC2-style points with no regressions, with gains reaching +47.20 MC1 and +43.38 MC2-style points. The method uses no labels, retrieval, pretraining, finetuning, or per-model calibration.
2605.18163.paper_summary_zh: 幻覺修正並不是一個單向問題。<lb/>我們顯示中間層既不是比最終層更真實，也不是一致地不可信。<lb/>然而，幻覺減少通常是通過一種固定的干預形式來實現的：將一層與另一層進行對比，沿著真實性方向引導，或依賴外部證據。<lb/>這種框架在結構上是不完整的。<lb/>跨層事實證據並不均勻演變：在一些失敗中，內部存在真實的支持但後來被抑制，而在其他情況下，候選競爭在深度上依然是真正的多方向，因此沒有單一的帶符號標量家族通常是足夠的。<lb/>我們引入了基於跨層證據的幻覺減少的軌跡修正（TRACE），這是一種確定性的、無需訓練的算法，它通過從每個輸入的跨層候選軌跡中推導出修正層和適當的修正運算符，在推理時修正幻覺。<lb/>在一個固定的超參數設置下，TRACE 在標量反轉、早期狀態恢復和候選空間修正之間選擇，僅使用模型內部證據。<lb/>在15個模型、8個模型家族和3個事實性基準的單一通用算法評估中，TRACE 改進了每個評估單元，平均獲得 +12.26 MC1 點和 +8.65 MC2 風格點，且沒有回歸，增益達到 +47.20 MC1 和 +43.38 MC2 風格點。<lb/>該方法不使用標籤、檢索、預訓練、微調或每個模型的校準。
2605.18163.author: Tej Sanibh Ranade et.al.
